description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hohoemis Home Nursing Station is located within the Higashi-Agano Medical and Care Center and staffed by nurses with extensive experience in medical settings. Based on instructions from your primary care physician, we support home care life through health monitoring, pressure ulcer prevention, rehabilitation, personal care, and medical procedures.

【Who we serve】 Bedridden individuals, those needing rehabilitation, those requiring medical procedures, those with intractable diseases, terminal cancer, dementia, or mental illness who wish to receive home care, and others.

【Visiting schedule】 Monday–Friday (closed weekends, holidays, year-end/New Year)
【Visiting hours】 8:30 a.m. to 5:15 p.m.
【Frequency】 Up to 3 visits per week in principle (varies by condition)

【Fees】
• Long-term care insurance users: For nurse visits, under 20 minutes ¥328–¥982 (varies by self-pay rate), 20–30 minutes ¥491–¥1,473, etc.
• Medical insurance users: Self-pay rate is 20–30% depending on age and insurance status
For details, please contact us.

【Location】 25-1 Torahide, Hanno, Saitama Prefecture (within Higashi-Agano Medical and Care Center; dedicated entrance on basement floor)
【Phone】 042-978-1922

We use an online eligibility verification system that accepts My Number Cards.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/iryo/2431.html
